purpose: An authentication client that logs into a remote API by hashing a password, stores the session token in localStorage, and makes authenticated GET/PUT requests using Bearer token authorization.

functions.name: sendRequest
functions.purpose: Core HTTP request dispatcher with fetch()

functions.name: login
functions.purpose: Authenticate user, hash password, store token in localStorage

functions.name: getUserProfile
functions.purpose: Fetch user profile with Bearer token from localStorage

functions.name: updateProfile
functions.purpose: Update user profile via PUT with Bearer token

security.issue: Weak password hashing - not cryptographic (simple hashCode variant)
Session token stored in localStorage (vulnerable to XSS)
No token expiration or refresh mechanism
Error messages leak HTTP status information
String obfuscation provides false sense of security
No CSRF protection on API requests

dataFlow: password → hashCode hash → POST /auth/login → token → localStorage → GET/PUT /users/:id with Bearer token
entryPoint: login function called at global scope with admin credentials
